  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  Add a -nox11 version of qbittorrent-26 as a slave port.
  
  Based in part on work in the PR, but I used a different approach.
  
  PR:             ports/152550
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3@amdmi3.ru>
  
  Feature safe:   yes
